meaning: 坦皮科 [墨西哥东部港市]
examples: A city of eastern Mexico on the Gulf of Mexico. It is a suburb of Tampico. Population, 32,444.
Born in Tampico, Illinois, and then raised in Dixon, Illinois, he moved west to follow his dreams.
Two small towns in Illinois, Dixon and Tampico, were his roots.
In Tampico, the population was less than 1000.
